reminders.message: 💧 Good morning, {name}! Start your day with a big glass of water. Hydration = performance.
🥗 Lunchtime check-in! Your daily target is {daily_calorie_target} kcal. Staying on track?
🏋️ Still time for a workout! Even 20 minutes makes a difference. You've got this, {name}.
🌙 Wind-down time. Aim for 7–9 hours tonight. Great sleep is where the progress happens.
🏆 New week, new challenge! Type /challenges to see this week's mission.
